Actions.Text: REFERRED TO CIVIL SERVICE AND PENSIONS
COMMITTEE DISCHARGED AND COMMITTED TO RULES

Title: Removes the authority of the state civil service commission to administer the county service in Westchester
Summary: Removes the authority of the state civil service commission to administer the county service in Westchester.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend chapter 617 of the laws of 1937 relating to an additional alternative form of government for the county of Westchester, in relation to the authority of the state civil service commission to administer the county service in Westchester
